title: Inquests (Qualifications for Appointment as Coroners) Notice, 1984
title_en: Inquests (Qualifications for Appointment as Coroners) Notice, 1984

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Inquests (Qualifications for Appointment as Coroner) Notice.

provisions.title: Qualified persons
provisions.content: For the purposes of the Inquests Act, a person shall be qualified for appointment to the office of Coroner who— (a) is a person in retirement who formerly served as a magistrate of any description or grade; (b) is a person in retirement who formerly served as a police officer in rank not lower than Inspector of Police; (c) is a person in retirement who formerly served as an administrative officer of any rank in the Government of the United Republic of Tanzania; (d) is a retired public officer of any other description who, in the opinion of the Minister, is capable of discharging the functions of the office of Coroner and is well respected within the area of his domicile; (e) is a public officer who, in the opinion of the Minister, has the ability to enable him to discharge the functions of a Coroner. Omitted notices The following Notices are omitted— (Under section 2) G.N. No. 113 of 1984 The Inquests (Appointment of Appropriate Authority Notice. (Under section 5(2) and (3)) G.N.
